overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring dark, atmospheric industrial environments. The character moves through brick corridors, foggy outdoor docks, and derelict indoor spaces with warm artificial lighting, creating a horror-themed ambiance.

ascends metal staircase back to upper level

metal grate walkway allowing view to lower levels

large metal pipes running along the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow industrial corridor with brick walls and metal grate flooring. Warm wall sconces provide the only illumination as the character descends and ascends metal staircases within the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy dock or rooftop with burning barrels

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a foggy outdoor dock or rooftop illuminated by burning barrels and street lamps. The thick fog limits visibility as the character walks along the concrete surface toward a distant wooden door.

events.description: enters wooden door into building with wallpapered walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a derelict building with wallpapered walls and a lit fireplace. A body lies on the floor near the fire as the character moves through the debris-filled room toward a wooden staircase.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to the upper floor and enters a bedroom containing a wooden bed, dresser, and framed pictures. The space is dimly lit as the character moves through the corridor toward an exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with Flying Horse tavern

segments.scene_description: The character exits to a foggy back alley featuring the 'Flying Horse' tavern sign, vintage parked cars, and burning torches. After jumping down from a wooden platform, the character explores the cobblestone alleyway between brick buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a foggy outdoor expanse and finally into a derelict interior. It begins within a narrow brick hallway, moving across metal grate flooring and navigating staircases illuminated by warm wall sconces. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene shifts to a concrete dock shrouded in thick fog, where visibility is limited to the glow of burning barrels and street lamps. The camera then follows the path toward a distant wooden door, passing from the cold outdoor mist into a decaying room with wallpapered walls and a lit fireplace. Finally, the movement glides past a body lying on the debris-strewn floor before turning toward a wooden staircase.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a dim residence into a foggy, torch-lit industrial alleyway. It begins as the character ascends to an upper floor and moves through a dimly lit bedroom furnished with a wooden bed and dresser before proceeding down a narrow corridor. As the character reaches the exit door, the scene opens into a misty back alley where the warm glow of burning torches illuminates vintage parked cars and a sign for the Flying Horse tavern. The camera then follows the character as they jump down from a wooden platform, shifting the perspective toward the damp cobblestones and towering brick walls of the outdoor passage.
